auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Airtable personal access token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in the Airtable developer hub at https://airtable.com/create/tokens.

actions.name: create_base
actions.description: Create an Airtable base in a workspace with the provided initial table and field schema.

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID in the format wspXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

type.description: Airtable field type, such as singleLineText.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

items.description: Airtable field configuration accepted by metadata write endpoints.

fields.description: Field configurations to create in the Airtable table.

items.description: Airtable table configuration accepted when creating a base or table.

tables.description: Tables to create along with the new Airtable base.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

description.description: Table description when Airtable returns one.

primaryFieldId.description: Primary field ID configured for the table.

dateDependencySettings.description: Date dependency settings returned by Airtable for the table.

description.description: Field description when Airtable returns one.

fields.description: Fields defined on the Airtable table.

visibleFieldIds.description: Field IDs visible in the Airtable view.

views.description: Views defined on the Airtable table.

tables.description: Tables created with the Airtable base.

actions.name: create_field
actions.description: Create a field in an Airtable table.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableId.description: Table ID in the format tblXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

type.description: Airtable field type, such as singleLineText.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

description.description: Field description when Airtable returns one.

actions.name: create_records
actions.description: Create one or more Airtable records in a table.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableIdOrName.description: Table ID or table name accepted by the Airtable path parameter.

fields.description: Record fields keyed by field name or field ID.

items.description: Record payload used when creating Airtable records.

records.description: Records to create in the Airtable table.

typecast.description: Whether Airtable should coerce incoming values to compatible field types.

returnFieldsByFieldId.description: Whether Airtable should return field IDs instead of field names in record objects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

createdTime.description: Record creation timestamp returned by Airtable.

fields.description: Record fields keyed by field name or field ID.

commentCount.description: Comment count returned by Airtable when enabled on the endpoint.

actions.name: create_table
actions.description: Create a table in an Airtable base with the provided field schema.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

type.description: Airtable field type, such as singleLineText.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

items.description: Airtable field configuration accepted by metadata write endpoints.

fields.description: Field configurations to create in the Airtable table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

description.description: Table description when Airtable returns one.

primaryFieldId.description: Primary field ID configured for the table.

dateDependencySettings.description: Date dependency settings returned by Airtable for the table.

description.description: Field description when Airtable returns one.

fields.description: Fields defined on the Airtable table.

visibleFieldIds.description: Field IDs visible in the Airtable view.

views.description: Views defined on the Airtable table.

actions.name: delete_base
actions.description: Delete an Airtable base. Airtable restricts this endpoint to enterprise admins.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deleted.description: Whether Airtable reports the base as deleted.

actions.name: delete_records
actions.description: Delete one or more Airtable records by record ID.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableIdOrName.description: Table ID or table name accepted by the Airtable path parameter.

items.description: Record ID in the format recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

recordIds.description: Record IDs to delete from the Airtable table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

deleted.description: Whether Airtable reports the record as deleted.

actions.name: get_base_collaborators
actions.description: Read Airtable base metadata, including workspaceId and optional collaborator details.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

include.description: Optional Airtable base collaboration details to include.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

createdTime.description: Base creation timestamp returned by Airtable.

permissionLevel.description: Permission level reported by Airtable for the authenticated user.

workspaceId.description: Workspace ID in the format wspXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

collaborators.description: Deprecated collaborator metadata returned by Airtable.

groupCollaborators.description: Group collaborator metadata returned by Airtable.

individualCollaborators.description: Individual collaborator metadata returned by Airtable.

inviteLinks.description: Invite link metadata returned by Airtable.

actions.name: get_base_schema
actions.description: Read Airtable table, field, and view schema for a specific base.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

include.description: Optional Airtable schema details to include in table views.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

description.description: Table description when Airtable returns one.

primaryFieldId.description: Primary field ID configured for the table.

dateDependencySettings.description: Date dependency settings returned by Airtable for the table.

description.description: Field description when Airtable returns one.

fields.description: Fields defined on the Airtable table.

visibleFieldIds.description: Field IDs visible in the Airtable view.

views.description: Views defined on the Airtable table.

tables.description: Tables returned by Airtable for the base.

actions.name: get_record
actions.description: Read a single Airtable record by record ID.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableIdOrName.description: Table ID or table name accepted by the Airtable path parameter.

cellFormat.description: Cell format accepted by Airtable for read operations.

timeZone.description: Timezone string sent to Airtable when cellFormat is string.

userLocale.description: User locale sent to Airtable when cellFormat is string.

returnFieldsByFieldId.description: Whether Airtable should return field IDs instead of field names in record objects.

includeDateDependencyMetadata.description: Whether Airtable should return date dependency metadata for linked record fields.

recordId.description: Record ID in the format recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

createdTime.description: Record creation timestamp returned by Airtable.

fields.description: Record fields keyed by field name or field ID.

commentCount.description: Comment count returned by Airtable when enabled on the endpoint.

actions.name: list_bases
actions.description: List Airtable bases accessible to the authenticated personal access token.

offset.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Airtable response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

permissionLevel.description: Permission level reported by Airtable for this base.

anyOf.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of bases, or null when unavailable.

actions.name: list_records
actions.description: List Airtable records from a table with optional fields, sorting, view filters, formula filters, and pagination.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableIdOrName.description: Table ID or table name accepted by the Airtable path parameter.

cellFormat.description: Cell format accepted by Airtable for read operations.

timeZone.description: Timezone string sent to Airtable when cellFormat is string.

userLocale.description: User locale sent to Airtable when cellFormat is string.

returnFieldsByFieldId.description: Whether Airtable should return field IDs instead of field names in record objects.

includeDateDependencyMetadata.description: Whether Airtable should return date dependency metadata for linked record fields.

view.description: View name or view ID used by Airtable to filter and sort results.

fields.description: Field names or field IDs to include in the Airtable response.

field.description: Field name or field ID used by Airtable for sorting.

items.description: Sort rule accepted by the Airtable list records endpoint.

sort.description: Sort rules applied by Airtable in order.

filterByFormula.description: Formula string evaluated by Airtable to filter matching records.

maxRecords.description: Maximum total number of records to return before Airtable stops pagination.

pageSize.description: Number of records to return per page.

offset.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by a previous Airtable response.

recordMetadata.description: Record metadata fields to include in Airtable list records responses.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

createdTime.description: Record creation timestamp returned by Airtable.

fields.description: Record fields keyed by field name or field ID.

commentCount.description: Comment count returned by Airtable when enabled on the endpoint.

anyOf.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of records, or null when unavailable.

actions.name: update_field
actions.description: Update an Airtable field name, description, or type-specific options.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableId.description: Table ID in the format tblXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

columnId.description: Field ID in the format fldXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

description.description: Field description when Airtable returns one.

actions.name: update_records
actions.description: Update one or more existing Airtable records by record ID.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableIdOrName.description: Table ID or table name accepted by the Airtable path parameter.

id.description: Record ID in the format recXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

fields.description: Record fields keyed by field name or field ID.

items.description: Record payload used when updating Airtable records.

records.description: Records to update in the Airtable table.

typecast.description: Whether Airtable should coerce incoming values to compatible field types.

returnFieldsByFieldId.description: Whether Airtable should return field IDs instead of field names in record objects.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

createdTime.description: Record creation timestamp returned by Airtable.

fields.description: Record fields keyed by field name or field ID.

commentCount.description: Comment count returned by Airtable when enabled on the endpoint.

records.description: Records returned by Airtable after update.

actions.name: update_table
actions.description: Update an Airtable table name, description, or date dependency settings.

baseId.description: Base ID in the format appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX.

tableIdOrName.description: Table ID or table name accepted by the Airtable path parameter.

description.description: Optional Airtable description, up to 20,000 characters.

dateDependencySettings.description: Airtable date dependency settings for a table.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

description.description: Table description when Airtable returns one.

primaryFieldId.description: Primary field ID configured for the table.

dateDependencySettings.description: Date dependency settings returned by Airtable for the table.

description.description: Field description when Airtable returns one.

fields.description: Fields defined on the Airtable table.

visibleFieldIds.description: Field IDs visible in the Airtable view.

views.description: Views defined on the Airtable table.
